creator: meta@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 174821
patch

Former configuration files are located in %%PREFIX%%/etc/letsencrypt.sh not %%PREFIX%%/etc/letsencrypt.

letsencrypt.sh-0.3.0:
        /usr/local/bin/letsencrypt.sh
        /usr/local/etc/letsencrypt.sh/config.example
        /usr/local/etc/letsencrypt.sh/domains.txt.example
        /usr/local/etc/letsencrypt.sh/hook.sh.example
        /usr/local/etc/periodic/weekly/000.letsencrypt.sh
        /usr/local/share/doc/letsencrypt.sh/README.md
        /usr/local/share/doc/letsencrypt.sh/dns-verification.md
        /usr/local/share/doc/letsencrypt.sh/domains_txt.md
        /usr/local/share/doc/letsencrypt.sh/ecc.md
        /usr/local/share/doc/letsencrypt.sh/hook_chain.md
        /usr/local/share/doc/letsencrypt.sh/import-from-official-client.md
        /usr/local/share/doc/letsencrypt.sh/per-certificate-config.md
        /usr/local/share/doc/letsencrypt.sh/staging.md
        /usr/local/share/doc/letsencrypt.sh/troubleshooting.md
        /usr/local/share/doc/letsencrypt.sh/wellknown.md
        /usr/local/share/licenses/letsencrypt.sh-0.3.0/LICENSE
        /usr/local/share/licenses/letsencrypt.sh-0.3.0/MIT
        /usr/local/share/licenses/letsencrypt.sh-0.3.0/catalog.mk
